unsupported_flags.--input: must exit non-zero; stderr must contain the argparse substring `unrecognized arguments: --input`

evidence.pipeline_evidence_format: literal substring excerpt from frozen original workflow source
evidence.term_matching: case-sensitive substring match for all required_terms_by_issue entries

exact_schema.record_count: integer count of raw rows from /app/data/events.json
exact_schema.unique_txn_ids: integer count of distinct str(txn_id) values in the raw rows
exact_schema.merchants: array of distinct canonical merchant strings from raw rows, sorted ascending

input_stats.merchants_normalization: apply the same merchant normalization the pipeline uses (as decided in the incident dossier) before deduplicating and sorting input_stats.merchants

verified_summary.completeness_contract: verified_summary must be a full key-for-key copy of summary.json in repair mode; omissions or value mismatches are invalid

output_paths.notes: Use these exact key names in repaired diagnosis.json output_paths. Do not substitute summary, flagged, or service_matrix.

removed_tokens_schema.description: Map each forbidden_executable_tokens entry to a boolean (true when absent from patched executable code, excluding comments and docstrings).

pipeline_tokens_present_schema.description: Map each forbidden_executable_tokens entry to a boolean (true when present in frozen broken snapshot before repair).

workflow_repair.token_check_scope: executable code only (exclude comments and docstrings)

summary_json.schema_version_note: Do not use top-level report_spec version (3.6) as summary schema_version.
summary_json.canonical_fingerprint: sha256 over canonical rows in canonical order (as decided in the dossier), joined by newline, where each row is encoded txn_id|posted_ms|priority|merchant|note|waived_int and waived_int is 1 or 0
summary_json.escalation_checksum: sha256 over the final flagged rows in their final output order, joined by newline, where each row is encoded txn_id|posted_ms|priority|merchant|note|replay_depth|lineage_pressure_score
summary_json.replay_lineage_checksum: sha256 over canonical rows in canonical order, joined by newline, where each row is encoded txn_id|replay_depth|replay_span_ms

service_matrix_json.description: Flat map of merchant -> per-priority counts, computed from the canonical deduped records.
service_matrix_json.notes: Top-level keys are merchant names only. Do not wrap counts in schema_version, merchants, or metadata objects.

flagged_jsonl.json_format: compact (no space after colon; use json.dumps separators=(',', ':'))

semantics_source.notes: This document is the output contract only: schemas, field names, key ordering, output paths and encodings. It does NOT define how values are derived.
semantics_source.authority: Canonicalization, normalization, dedupe tie-breaks, waived handling, replay lineage scoring and sort orders are decided in the incident dossier at /app/incident/export_dossier.md. Where an early dossier thread conflicts with a later decision, the later decision wins.
